rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0040
rows.name: He too was born as a member of Samaar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Void, who was an extraordinary genius,
researched the ultimate object called the Gate,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0060
rows.name:
reduced its power into six
cores, and created the Ares.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0080
rows.name: that resulted in awakening the Ghosts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0090
rows.name:
The people of Samaar deemed
Void the root cause,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0100
rows.name:
destroyed the Ares, and sealed Void's consciousness
in a prison within the rift between worlds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0120
rows.name:
The floating continent
that appeared on Mira is[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0130
rows.name:
that prison that emerged from the
rift between worlds along with Void.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0140
rows.name:
For Void, locked away in
the rift between worlds,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0160
rows.name: What brought him suffering was "not knowing."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0200
rows.name: he "just innocently" tried to know it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0220
rows.name:
a crack formed in the cage of the consciousness
prison that had locked Void away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0240
rows.name:
Did the prison reach its limit, or was
there interference from another world[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0250
rows.name:
In any case, Void's consciousness
was freed from the prison.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0270
rows.name:
Void appeared in the universe where
Elma's home planet was located.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0280
rows.name:
His physical body was gone, but he manifested using
a vessel created by those who worshipped him[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0310
rows.name:
and with their power, he
tried to "know death."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0320
rows.name:
First, he began an advance on Elma's
home planet to reclaim the Ares.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0340
rows.name:
In response to those phenomena,
the Ghosts appeared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0350
rows.name:
Elma's home planet vanished due to the
clash between the Growth and the Ghosts,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0370
rows.name:
Even as he witnessed the abundance of death before
his very eyes, he never tried to understand it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0390
rows.name: The terror of his own existence disappearing[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0410
rows.name: The people of Samaar, the Ghosts[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0420
rows.name:
Void continued to flee from the powers that
tried to eliminate his existence, and[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0430
rows.name:
at the end of his journey, he suffered
defeat, and knew death for the first time[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0540
rows.name: That place wasn't a prison or anything[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0550
rows.name:
I think maybe it was a
path leading to heaven.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0610
rows.name: You idiot, don't make us worry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0630
rows.name: believed that you would come back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0640
rows.name: Anyway, we can be relieved for now, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0690
rows.name: Did you not believe in him!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0700
rows.name: N-No, that's not what I meant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0710
rows.name: If it's not what you meant, then what is it!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0740
rows.name:
Either way, it's good that
he's safe, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33860100_MSG0750
rows.name:
As the ancients say, rain falls and
the ground hardens, doesn't it.[ST:wait ]
